gaps: No browser-level smoke test exercises EventSource delivery, fallback polling, scroll preservation, or live source-error rendering in an actual DOM; current frontend verification is mostly static marker coverage plus backend/merge unit tests.

summary: Final review accepts the repaired integration branch. The previous blocking issue is addressed by preserving previously visible rounds, inbox groups, and selected-round timeline data when message, notification, or round-event sources fail, while surfacing source-specific errors. The frontend now subscribes to the implemented /api/live SSE endpoint instead of the nonexistent /api/updates path. Verification passed with uv run scripts/test-web-app-hub.py, python3 scripts/validate-openspec-change.py autorefresh-web-app, and uv run python -m py_compile scripts/web_app_hub.py scripts/test-web-app-hub.py. PR is ready, with the remaining non-blocking gap that browser-level SSE/UI behavior is not covered by an end-to-end smoke.
